summary: Comprehensive testing completed for content-based recommendation system with Netflix dataset integration. All backend APIs (25/25 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Authentication, user profiles, movie recommendations, and dataset integration all functional.
passed_tests: Dataset stats API (17,529 movies: 9,742 MovieLens + 7,787 Netflix)
User registration and admin login (admin@example.com / admin123)
JWT authentication with Bearer token support
User profile endpoints (rate, ratings, watchlist, recommendation history)
Netflix movie filtering and metadata (director, cast, description, source)
All 7 recommendation algorithms active (TF-IDF, Genre, Combined, Word2Vec, BERT, Collaborative, Hybrid)
Movie search, similarity comparison, evaluation metrics
Frontend auth page with Sign In and Continue as Guest options
User name display in navbar after login, Profile link visibility
Dataset stats banner showing MovieLens + Netflix counts
Movie cards with source badges (ML for MovieLens, N for Netflix)
Movie detail modal with Netflix metadata display
Profile page with ratings, watchlist, history tabs

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor DOM timing issue at end, all features functional)
